title: Contact Zemna.AI
description: We'd love to hear from you. Please fill out the form below and we'll get back to you as soon as possible.
faqWhatIsAnswer: Zemna.AI is a scientific writing and publication platform. It provides a rich-text editor with LaTeX equations, citation highlighting (Pronto), auto-save, version history, and an AI research assistant to help researchers draft and structure papers.
faqStart: How do I start writing a paper?
faqStartAnswer: Sign in and open the Editor from the navigation. Create a new document or choose a template (e.g. Research Article, Review Paper). Use the toolbar for formatting, equations, tables, and Pronto to highlight and validate in-text citations.
faqSavedAnswer: Yes. Zemna.AI auto-saves your publication every 30 seconds. You can also use version history to restore earlier drafts or create named snapshots.
faqExport: Can I export to PDF or Word?
faqExportAnswer: Export to PDF, Word (DOCX), and Markdown is supported. Use the Export option in the editor header when your document is ready.

sidebar.zemnaInfoDesc: Scientific writing and publication platform with LaTeX, Pronto citations, and AI research assistant.
sidebar.needHelpDesc: Check our docs or reach out.
